# Classic USD — The Fiat-Backed US Dollar for Ethereum Classic

> Classic USD ($USC) is a regulated, fiat-backed stablecoin on Ethereum Classic and Polygon. Each $USC is backed 1:1 by US dollars and redeemable at any time.

## About

Classic USD ($USC) is the first and definitive US dollar stablecoin on Ethereum Classic. Issued by Brale Inc. (NMLS #2376957), a US-regulated financial services company with state money transmission licenses. $USC brings dollar liquidity to ETC's DeFi ecosystem.

## How It Works

1. **Mint** — Deposit USD through the Brale Platform to receive $USC tokens 1:1.
2. **Use** — Trade on ETCswap, provide liquidity, or use in DeFi protocols.
3. **Redeem** — Burn $USC to receive USD, USDC, or USDP back 1:1.

## Token Details

- Name: Classic USD
- Symbol: USC
- Decimals: 6
- Standard: ERC-20

## Deployed Contracts

- Ethereum Classic (Chain 61): `0xDE093684c796204224BC081f937aa059D903c52a`
- Polygon (Chain 137): `0x131409b31bf446737dd04353d43dacada544b6fa`
- Mordor Testnet (Chain 63): `0xDE093684c796204224BC081f937aa059D903c52a`

## Key Features

- Fiat-backed 1:1 by US dollars in reserve
- US-regulated issuer (Brale Inc., NMLS #2376957)
- Regular third-party reserve attestations
- Multi-chain: Ethereum Classic + Polygon
- Tradeable on ETCswap V2 and V3

## DeFi Integrations

- ETCswap V2 — Simple AMM DEX (v2.etcswap.org)
- ETCswap V3 — Concentrated liquidity CLMM DEX (v3.etcswap.org)

## Web Properties

- classicusd.com — This site (USC information)
- app.brale.xyz — Mint and redeem USC
- etcswap.org — Trade USC on DEX
- coingecko.com/en/coins/classic-usd — Market data

## Issuer

Brale Inc. — US-regulated financial services company (NMLS #2376957)

## Authors

- White B0x Inc. (whiteb0x.com)
